title: Mari in 30
wikitext:
[]: Mari in 3.0 [spoilers] Post by dummysystem » Sat May 11, 2013 7:49 pm note : The old Mari topic was locked so I cannot post there So I finally received 3.33 and I have a question/theory about Mari (which I started to have since 2.0) My apologies in advance if it was already covered/mentioned ... In 3.33, when Fuyutsuki talked with Shinji, he showed him a picture of Yui ... Who is on the right ? At first it looks like it's Asuka, but the glasses reminds me of Mari. It may also be Kyoko Zeppelin Soryu, then in that case, I was thinking that Mari is a clone of Asuka's mother. It also fits with the impression I had of her in 2.0. Asuka in the TV serie always showed 2 aspects : joyful and sad. But in 2.0, she was ~ always sad, whereas Mari took the joyful part. That's why I thought Mari and Asuka in Rebuild were the 2 different faces of Asuka [TV serie]. Considering also that Mari pilots Eva 02 ... So does it sound stupid/crazy ?

[]: Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sat May 11, 2013 7:53 pm It's right there..... SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by ElMariachi » Sat May 11, 2013 7:58 pm There is already a topic talking about the photograph, look here : http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/14306/SPOILERS-The-Photograph/

Article: Mari in 30
[]: Mari in 3.0 [spoilers] Post by dummysystem » Sat May 11, 2013 7:49 pm note : The old Mari topic was locked so I cannot post there So I finally received 3.33 and I have a question/theory about Mari (which I started to have since 2.0) My apologies in advance if it was already covered/mentioned ... In 3.33, when Fuyutsuki talked with Shinji, he showed him a picture of Yui ... Who is on the right ? At first it looks like it's Asuka, but the glasses reminds me of Mari. It may also be Kyoko Zeppelin Soryu, then in that case, I was thinking that Mari is a clone of Asuka's mother. It also fits with the impression I had of her in 2.0. Asuka in the TV serie always showed 2 aspects : joyful and sad. But in 2.0, she was ~ always sad, whereas Mari took the joyful part. That's why I thought Mari and Asuka in Rebuild were the 2 different faces of Asuka [TV serie]. Considering also that Mari pilots Eva 02 ... So does it sound stupid/crazy ?

[]: Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sat May 11, 2013 7:53 pm It's right there..... SPOILER: Show
